top_signals.title: Pentagon chief sounds ‘alarm’ over China’s buildup, urges allies to boost defense spending
top_signals.summary: Hegseth urged Asian allies to ramp up military spending to counter China’s growing power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Episode 89: Epsom Derby Festival preview with George Waud on Maltese Cross
top_signals.summary: Tom Marriott and Bill Esdaile are back to preview the Epsom Derby Festival, featuring the Oaks and the Derby, with selections and analysis across the two days of action. Tom caught up with George Waud, owner of Maltese Cross, who looks forward to his run in the Derby and Wally Pyrah returns to preview Wednesday’s [...]

top_signals.title: Copper price: Goldman, Citi make bullish calls on supply woes
top_signals.summary: Goldman now sees prices $13,735/ton by the end of this year, more than 10% higher than its previous target of $12,465/ton.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: LR, SHI, Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp to Design Floating Data Center
